other_observers: Several people saw the bird from Nov 15-Dec 16, 2017.  I found it first on Nov 15th and saw it on Dec 1st and late on Dec 16th.
specific_location: Arkansas River in Pueblo, near Reservoir Drive
description: A green warbler, with wing bars, very white underneath.  First time the species has been found on a Colorado Christmas Bird Count, and first winter one ever for the Pueblo Area.  See photos.
